title: melampyrum ovalifolium f. albiflorum
intro: Melampyrum ovalifolium f. albiflorum, also known as the white-flowered melampyrum, is a plant species that belongs to the family Orobanchaceae, which is a type of parasitic flowering plant. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The herbal preparations of Melampyrum ovalifolium f. albiflorum include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, syrups, and salves for topical application.
